review_comment:
Can you remove this in `polars-arrow`? That's the place where we can raise. 

Another benefit is that we then have to  compile less code. ;)

You mean move this to `polars-arrow`? It already raises in `polars-arrow`. The problem is that all logical casts fall back to casting their physical representation, so we have to pre-empt the fallback here.

We can also get rid of that fallback (probably a good idea), but that would require a bigger refactor I think.
Oh, yeap, you're right. Ignore what I said.
